title: Mildly Spicy Croatian Lamb Kebabs
description: Tender and flavorful lamb kebabs with a hint of spice and rose water, perfect for a festive dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, rose water, garlic, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking and grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Transfer the kebabs to a slate tile and brush with lemon juice.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or rosemary if desired.
